extension.description: Open extension point for custom properties

areas.description: List pages should contain at least one data-table block
Form pages should contain form-section and form-buttons blocks
Detail pages typically contain tabs with sub-tables
Dashboard pages should contain chart and stat-card blocks

pagination.description: Whether the API supports pagination (default: true)

colSpan.description: Grid column span for this field (shorthand for layout.colSpan)

action.deprecated: Use `label` for i18n display text. Kept for backward compatibility.

events.deprecated: Use `action: { type: "flow", handler }` for onClick handlers.

confirm.description: Confirmation prompt i18n key — shown before executing the action.

reportCode.description: Custom report code (for report generation buttons)

successMessage.description: Success message to display after step execution

rowActions.description: Row-level action buttons (displayed in each row)

treeConfig.description: Tree configuration — enables hierarchical expandable rows

editable.description: Enable inline editing for this column.

tagConfig.description: Tag rendering configuration (boolean tag: trueLabel/falseLabel + colors)

blocks.description: Detail tab blocks (present only when tab is a DetailTabConfig in a union context)

filter.description: List tab filter (present only when tab is a ListTabConfig in a union context)

treeConfig.description: Tree configuration — enables hierarchical display + drag reparent

allowInlineEdit.description: Enable inline editing of existing rows (default: true when commands.update exists).

editableColumns.description: If specified, only these column fields are editable inline

rowValidation.description: Enable row-level validation on inline edit (default: false)

crossRowRules.description: Cross-row validation rules (e.g., total amount <= budget).

intermediateParentField.description: Foreign key on intermediate model pointing to parent

filterCondition.description: Additional filter condition on intermediate model

value.description: Threshold value or field reference from parent record (e.g., "${record.budget}")

$comment: Auto-generated from web-admin/app/meta/schemas/dsl-schema-types.ts — DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY. Run: cd web-admin && pnpm generate:dsl-schema
